title: DNZ's Items
body:
Required: Geckolib

[EN]After TürkOyuncuDNZ's career ended. He spread his essence all over the world to make his mark in this game!

[TR]TürkOyuncuDNZ'nin kariyeri biitikten sonra. Bu oyunda izini bırakmak için tüm dünyaya kendi özünü yaydı!

![https://www.turkoyuncudnz.nl/ana-sayfa/dnz-mod-wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0f3011435e3d2d4302633626de248d0bb373ef1.png)

[https://www.turkoyuncudnz.nl/ana-sayfa/dnz-mod-wiki](https://www.turkoyuncudnz.nl/ana-sayfa/dnz-mod-wiki)

You can visit the Wiki Page to learn the mod!

Modu Öğrenmek İçin Wiki Sayfasını Ziyaret Edebilirsiniz!

 ![https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dnz-skibidi-toilet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45ee6467c79bba72493317771eb440e7b140081.png)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/dnz-skibidi-toilet](https://modrinth.com/mod/dnz-skibidi-toilet)
